creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Fri Aug  2 17:37:19 2013
New Revision: 324170
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/324170

Log:
  www/rssroll: update to 0.4
  
  - Update to 0.4 [1]
  - Add LICENSE (BSD)
  
  Changes: http://chaosophia.net/rssroll/docs/ChangeLog
  
  PR:		ports/180998
  Submitted by:	Nikola Kolev <koue chaosophia.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/rssroll/Makefile
  head/www/rssroll/distinfo

Modified: head/www/rssroll/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/rssroll/Makefile	Fri Aug  2 17:34:39 2013	(r324169)
+++ head/www/rssroll/Makefile	Fri Aug  2 17:37:19 2013	(r324170)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rssroll
-PORTVERSION=	0.3
+PORTVERSION=	0.4
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://chaosophia.net/downloads/rssroll/ \
 		http://ns1.chaosophia.net/downloads/rssroll/
@@ -9,6 +9,8 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://chaosophia.net/down
 MAINTAINER=	koue@chaosophia.net
 COMMENT=	RSS collector in C
 
+LICENSE=	BSD
+
 LIB_DEPENDS=	curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl \
 		xml2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libxml2 \
 		sqlite3:${PORTSDIR}/databases/sqlite3

Modified: head/www/rssroll/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/rssroll/distinfo	Fri Aug  2 17:34:39 2013	(r324169)
+++ head/www/rssroll/distinfo	Fri Aug  2 17:37:19 2013	(r324170)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rssroll-0.3.tar.gz) = 93b5bb6d3c78dc66897b2fd7e13c12133883be406a1d1cc365047df3af3ff614
-SIZE (rssroll-0.3.tar.gz) = 105822
+SHA256 (rssroll-0.4.tar.gz) = 3d67ca2b8781e2618d3ae1e10ba15243fcb12696afc6f24ddef8aec833778ed9
+SIZE (rssroll-0.4.tar.gz) = 106582
